newsArray.title: Red mist: backlash as US ban lifted after Trump call
newsArray.description: European football's governing body UEFA has slammed FIFA for an "incomprehensible and unjustifiable decision" to let United States forward Folarin Balogun play on at the World Cup despite receiving a red card.

newsArray.title: FIFA takes U-turn on red card suspension for Folarin Balogun after Donald Trump calls Gianni Infantino to review
newsArray.description: FIFA has controversially lifted Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension for a red card, allowing the US forward to play against Belgium. The decision, reportedly influenced by a call from US President Donald Trump, has drawn sharp criticism from Belgium's football authorities. This unprecedented move, placing Balogun on a one-year probation, marks...
